title: selaginella mutica var. mutica
intro: Selaginella mutica var. mutica, also known as Spike moss, is a type of small, non-vascular plant belonging to the Selaginellaceae family. It has been traditionally used in medicine for its anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties, which make it a valuable remedy for various health issues. The plant is known to provide several health benefits, including relieving respiratory problems, reducing fever, and treating skin conditions such as eczema and acne. In herbal preparations, Selaginella mutica var. mutica is often used in teas, infusions, or tinctures, and is also used in traditional Chinese medicine to promote overall well-being and boost the immune system.
